title: BNB Chain goes live with full fundraising automation
content_html:
Cryptool is now on BNB Chain.

The full fundraising stack lands on one of the largest crypto ecosystems in the world, and everything that used to live in spreadsheets is automated from day one:

  • End-to-end fundraising flow, from pool setup to distribution
  • Syndicate management without the operational overhead
  • New launchpads spun up in seconds
  • One-click raise pool deployment
  • Native support for BNB, USDT and USDC

Next on the BNB roadmap: the OTC market, full portfolio and asset management, and co-investing.

For any team running fundraising on BNB Chain today, the time saved by switching off the manual flow is the immediate win.
author: Cryptool
